headline: Altria Faces Juul Antitrust Trials As Valuation Discount Draws Attention
summary: A federal court has allowed major antitrust class actions tied to Altria Group's past investment in Juul Labs to proceed to trial. The cases cover both resellers and indirect consumer purchasers across multiple US states. The decision broadens potential legal exposure related to prior e‑vapor market conduct involving NYSE:MO and Juul. Altria Group, listed as NYSE:MO, is a large US tobacco company with a portfolio that spans traditional cigarettes and oral tobacco products, alongside efforts...

headline: Assessing Altria Group’s (MO) Valuation As On! PLUS Nicotine Pouches Roll Out Nationwide
summary: Altria Group (MO) has drawn fresh attention after Helix Innovations, its operating company, launched a nationwide retail rollout of FDA authorized on! PLUS nicotine pouches, coinciding with renewed interest in defensive, dividend focused tobacco names. See our latest analysis for Altria Group. Altria's share price has moved to US$67.02, with a 4.1% 7 day share price return and a 16.9% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 19.5% points to firm, income focused...
